title: Dial Drunk
album: Stick Season (We'll All Be Here Forever)
why_this_song: Dial Drunk by Noah Kahan (2023) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Even the cops thought you were wrong for hanging up
I dial drunk, I'll die a drunk, I'll die for you
Traffic lights and a transmitter radio
I don't like it when they threw me in the car
I gave your name as my emergency phone call

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "drunk" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "drunk" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm rememberin' I promised to forget you now
I'll be bedridden, I'll let the pain metastasize
Let's wait, I swear she'll call me back

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Dial Drunk" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Dial Drunk" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Dial Drunk" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Dial Drunk" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Dial Drunk" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Dial Drunk", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Dial Drunk" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Dial Drunk" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
